title: Creamy British Sour Cream Gratin
description: A rich and comforting British-inspired side dish made with a tangy sour cream sauce and a crispy top.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, melt the molten butter over low heat.
Add the sour cream and stir until well combined.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until slightly thickened.
Stir in the British-style gratin and blue cheese crumbles until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and smooth the top.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the sauce is bubbly.
Garnish with chopped fresh chives and serve hot.
